sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Microsoft Halts Carbon Credit Purchases: Market Impact & Future - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Microsoft has reportedly paused its carbon removal credit purchases for 2026, citing financial considerations, despite being the dominant investor in this market. While some project developers were informed, a company spokesperson denied an indefinite suspension, and some existing contractors had not received official notification. This development occurs as Microsoft's own greenhouse gas emissions have substantially risen due to data center investments, even as it maintains a long-term goal of carbon negativity.

feed.title: 40 Selectron control units for Cummins Australia
feed.summary: Selectron Systems has received an order for 40 control units from Cummins Inc. Australia for traction control systems on Alstom VLocity trains. This marks the first major commercial success since duagon's integration into Knorr-Bremse Rail Vehicle Systems, combining expertise in embedded electronics, software, and communication technology. The control units will be used on diesel multiple units operating in Victoria, Australia, reinforcing the collaboration within the Knorr-Bremse group.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Stock Drops 14% as Barclays Slashes Price Target
